name: Filtered Ask Concentration (Low Volatility)
hypothesis: The contra-directional signal from a high ask-side concentration (an 'ask wall') is most predictive in low-volatility regimes. This filter removes periods of high volatility where aggressive buying flow is more likely to break the wall, improving signal consistency as suggested by feedback on iter011_ask_conc_final_frontier.
mutation_note: Based on feedback for iter011_ask_conc_final_frontier, which showed wins concentrated in low-volatility regimes. Added a volatility filter `rolling_realized_vol(mid_px, 100) < 30` to the best-performing parent `iter007_ask_conc_zscore_ultra` (threshold 5.0) to isolate the most favorable conditions.
